feedbacks.suggestion: The explanations for solid vs dashed white lines are very helpful.

challenges.title: Zebra Crossing Advocate
challenges.description: Take a photo or provide a short explanation of you actively crossing the high road using only marked zebra lines.

challenges.title: 3-Bin Kitchen Setup
challenges.description: Establish three distinct designated bins (Green, Blue, Red) in your home to segregate waste and take a picture proof.

challenges.title: No Single-Use Plastic Week
challenges.description: Replace plastic bags with standard jute or cloth bags for market purchases in Mangalapalem bazaar. Share proof.

announcements.title: Community Cleanliness Campaign Launch
announcements.content: Ward No 88 is launching a joint cleanliness and composting campaign on Sunday 9 AM. Join us near Mangalapalem Sachivalayam.
